items.title: Introducing Amazon Polly Bidirectional Streaming: Real-time speech synthesis for conversational AI
items.summary: Today, we’re excited to announce the new Bidirectional Streaming API for Amazon Polly, enabling streamlined real-time text-to-speech (TTS) synthesis where you can start sending text and receiving audio simultaneously. This new API is built for conversational AI applications that

items.title: Plan, divide, and conquer: How weak models excel at long context tasks
items.summary: As context windows grow, LLM performance degrades in unexpected ways. We show how a "Divide & Conquer" framework — breaking long documents into parallel chunks with a planner, workers, and manager — lets smaller models like Llama-3-70B and Qwen-72B outperform GPT-4o single-shot.

items.title: Unlocking video insights at scale with Amazon Bedrock multimodal models
items.summary: In this post, we explore how the multimodal foundation models (FMs) of Amazon Bedrock enable scalable video understanding through three distinct architectural approaches. Each approach is designed for different use cases and cost-performance trade-offs.

items.title: Reinforcement fine-tuning on Amazon Bedrock with OpenAI-Compatible APIs: a technical walkthrough
items.summary: In this post, we walk through the end-to-end workflow of using RFT on Amazon Bedrock with OpenAI-compatible APIs: from setting up authentication, to deploying a Lambda-based reward function, to kicking off a training job and running on-demand inference on your fine-tuned model.

items.title: Accelerating custom entity recognition with Claude tool use in Amazon Bedrock
items.summary: This post introduces Claude Tool use in Amazon Bedrock which uses the power of large language models (LLMs) to perform dynamic, adaptable entity recognition without extensive setup or training.

items.title: Overcoming LLM hallucinations in regulated industries: Artificial Genius’s deterministic models on Amazon Nova
items.summary: In this post, we’re excited to showcase how AWS ISV Partner Artificial Genius is using Amazon SageMaker AI and Amazon Nova to deliver a solution that is probabilistic on input but deterministic on output, helping to enable safe, enterprise-grade adoption.

items.title: Creating with Sora Safely
items.summary: To address the novel safety challenges posed by a state-of-the-art video model as well as a new social creation platform, we’ve built Sora 2 and the Sora app with safety at the foundation. Our approach is anchored in concrete protections.
